templates.title: 经典让步开头
templates.scene: Agree / Disagree 题型，需要先让步再反驳
templates.sentence: While it is true that ___, this view overlooks the fact that ___.
templates.how: 前半句承认对方观点的合理性，后半句用 overlook the fact that 把对方没看到的关键点拎出来，自然过渡到自己的论点。
templates.example: While it is true that online learning saves time, this view overlooks the fact that students lose the chance to develop social skills in real classrooms.
templates.pitfall: overlook 后必须接 the fact that + 完整句子，不要直接接名词。

templates.title: 部分同意句
templates.scene: 题目要求 To what extent，需要表达'部分同意'
templates.sentence: I partly agree with this statement: although ___ does have some merit, the underlying issue lies in ___.
templates.how: 考官特别看重 partly / to some extent 这种程度副词。前半承认对方的合理之处，后半用 the underlying issue 引出真正问题。
templates.example: I partly agree with this statement: although raising taxes on junk food does have some merit, the underlying issue lies in people's lack of nutritional awareness.
templates.pitfall: underlying issue 后接的是'根本问题'，不要写成具体例子。

templates.title: 反驳过渡句
templates.scene: 让步之后，正式开始反驳
templates.sentence: However, such reasoning fails to take into account ___, which is arguably the most decisive factor in this debate.
templates.how: fails to take into account 比 but / however 更有逻辑感。arguably the most decisive 自然带出本段要论证的核心。
templates.example: However, such reasoning fails to take into account long-term mental health, which is arguably the most decisive factor in this debate.
templates.pitfall: decisive factor 后面这一段必须真的论证它'为什么是 decisive'，否则空话扣分。

templates.title: 二选一题型让步
templates.scene: Discuss both views and give your own opinion
templates.sentence: Both perspectives carry weight, yet upon closer examination, the case for ___ proves more compelling.
templates.how: Both perspectives carry weight 表示两边都看了，upon closer examination 引出'我仔细想过之后倾向哪一边'，比直接说 I think 更有学术感。
templates.example: Both perspectives carry weight, yet upon closer examination, the case for stricter government regulation proves more compelling.
templates.pitfall: 后半句之后必须给出至少 2 个理由说明为什么 more compelling，否则结构不完整。

templates.title: 案例分析句
templates.scene: 举一个具体国家 / 公司 / 现象作为论据
templates.sentence: Take ___ as a case in point. Over the past decade, ___, which clearly demonstrates that ___.
templates.how: 前半句抛出案例，中间补背景或数据，最后用 which clearly demonstrates that 强制自己回扣观点。
templates.example: Take Singapore as a case in point. Over the past decade, the country has invested heavily in public transport, which clearly demonstrates that government intervention can effectively reduce traffic congestion.
templates.pitfall: which 后面接的句子必须是'对应你这段的核心论点'，不要写成新论点。

templates.title: 研究 / 数据引用句
templates.scene: 想引用研究但又不知道具体出处时使用
templates.sentence: A growing body of research suggests that ___, with recent studies showing that ___.
templates.how: A growing body of research suggests 是安全的'虚指'，考官不会要求你写出具体出处，但能让段落显得有据可依。
templates.example: A growing body of research suggests that working from home boosts productivity, with recent studies showing that remote employees complete 13% more tasks per day.
templates.pitfall: 数据可以编一个合理范围，但语气要稳，不要写 99% 这种夸张数字。

templates.title: 个人观察句
templates.scene: 实在想不出例子时，用'普遍现象'代替
templates.sentence: It is not uncommon to see ___ in today's society, and this trend can be traced back to ___.
templates.how: It is not uncommon to see 是观察类例子的安全开头，this trend can be traced back to 自然引出原因分析。
templates.example: It is not uncommon to see teenagers spending hours on short-video apps in today's society, and this trend can be traced back to the algorithm-driven design of these platforms.
templates.pitfall: Task 2 用观察类例子最多 1 次，多了会显得论证薄。

templates.title: 反例句（拉分关键）
templates.scene: 需要论证'如果不这样做会怎样'
templates.sentence: Consider, by contrast, what happens when ___: ___ becomes inevitable, undermining the very goal we set out to achieve.
templates.how: Consider, by contrast 提示考官'我现在要给反例了'。undermining the very goal 这种结构在 LR（词汇）一项很加分。
templates.example: Consider, by contrast, what happens when schools eliminate physical education: childhood obesity becomes inevitable, undermining the very goal of producing well-rounded students we set out to achieve.
templates.pitfall: 反例和正例之间的逻辑必须能闭环，否则考官看不出你想说什么。

templates.title: 长短期对比句
templates.scene: 想说'短期看着好，长期看不行'或反之
templates.sentence: Although ___ does carry some short-term appeal, its long-term consequences are far more concerning.
templates.how: 套这一句之后，下一句立刻展开 long-term consequences 是什么。时间维度的论证是雅思 7+ 作文的常见特征。
templates.example: Although banning private cars in city centers does carry some short-term appeal, its long-term consequences for small businesses are far more concerning.
templates.pitfall: 写完这句后，下一句必须真的解释'为什么长期看不行'，不要立刻又跳到新话题。

templates.title: 因果递进句
templates.scene: 从一个现象推导到更深的原因或结果
templates.sentence: What lies beneath this phenomenon is ___, which in turn gives rise to ___.
templates.how: What lies beneath 比 The reason is 更有深度感，which in turn 推出连锁反应，体现因果链。
templates.example: What lies beneath this phenomenon is the widening income gap, which in turn gives rise to social tensions that no government policy alone can resolve.
templates.pitfall: 因果链最多推 2 层，再多就显得绕，考官会扣 CC。

templates.title: 多角度切换句
templates.scene: 段落之间需要切换论证角度（经济 -> 社会 -> 环境等）
templates.sentence: Beyond the economic dimension, the issue also unfolds on a social level, where ___.
templates.how: Beyond the ___ dimension 是非常自然的角度切换。the issue also unfolds on a ___ level 暗示你要从新角度论证。
templates.example: Beyond the economic dimension, the issue also unfolds on a social level, where increasing automation reshapes the way people define their identity and self-worth.
templates.pitfall: 切换角度后必须真的从新角度论证，不要换汤不换药。

templates.title: 权衡式结尾
templates.scene: Agree / Disagree 题型的标准结尾
templates.sentence: Weighing both sides, I would argue that the benefits of ___ outweigh its drawbacks, particularly when ___ is taken into account.
templates.how: Weighing both sides 暗示你前文真的讨论了双方。particularly when ___ is taken into account 抛出最后一个支撑点，把结尾立住。
templates.example: Weighing both sides, I would argue that the benefits of remote work outweigh its drawbacks, particularly when employee well-being and productivity are taken into account.
templates.pitfall: particularly when 之后接的内容应该是文章里出现过的，不要凭空冒一个新概念。

templates.title: 政策建议式结尾
templates.scene: 题目问'是否应该 / 政府该怎么做'
templates.sentence: Rather than treating ___ as a quick fix, policymakers should focus on ___, which addresses the root cause of the problem.
templates.how: Rather than treating ___ as a quick fix 暗示你看穿了表面方案。addresses the root cause 让结尾显得有深度。
templates.example: Rather than treating heavy taxation as a quick fix, policymakers should focus on improving public education, which addresses the root cause of the problem.
templates.pitfall: 结尾不要提全新的论点，policymakers should focus on 后面的内容建议是文章里讨论过的方向。

templates.title: 展望式结尾
templates.scene: 话题涉及未来 / 趋势 / 科技
templates.sentence: Looking ahead, the question is no longer whether ___, but how we can ___ in a way that benefits the broader society.
templates.how: Looking ahead 把视角拉到未来。the question is no longer whether ___, but how 是非常高级的议题升华句式。
templates.example: Looking ahead, the question is no longer whether AI will replace human jobs, but how we can integrate it into the workforce in a way that benefits the broader society.
templates.pitfall: 升华要建立在前文论证基础上，不要为了升华而升华。

templates.title: 双对象趋势句
templates.scene: 图表中有两条曲线 / 两类对象
templates.sentence: Overall, ___ witnessed a steady increase, whereas ___ experienced a noticeable decline over the period.
templates.how: witnessed / experienced 都是拟人化动词，比单调的 went up / went down 高级。whereas 把对比关系写明。
templates.example: Overall, the consumption of bottled water witnessed a steady increase, whereas that of carbonated drinks experienced a noticeable decline over the period.
templates.pitfall: Overall 之后必须真的是'全局趋势'，不要把某一段细节当作 overall 来写。

templates.title: 多对象趋势句
templates.scene: 图表有 3 条以上数据线
templates.sentence: Overall, while ___ and ___ both saw upward trends, ___ moved in the opposite direction, leaving ___ as the most stable category throughout.
templates.how: 把 3-4 条数据按'上升 / 下降 / 稳定'分组，比逐条罗列清晰得多。
templates.example: Overall, while online sales and mobile orders both saw upward trends, in-store purchases moved in the opposite direction, leaving phone orders as the most stable category throughout.
templates.pitfall: 分组要准确，不要把上升的和稳定的归到一起。

templates.title: 静态图概述句
templates.scene: 饼图 / 表格 / 静态地图（非时间序列）
templates.sentence: Overall, ___ accounted for the largest proportion, while ___ made up only a small share, reflecting a clear imbalance across categories.
templates.how: 饼图 / 表格用 accounted for / made up 比 had / occupied 更地道。reflecting a clear imbalance 自然引出对比。
templates.example: Overall, electricity accounted for the largest proportion of household energy use, while solar power made up only a small share, reflecting a clear imbalance across categories.
templates.pitfall: 饼图概述句不需要写百分比，留到正文写。

templates.title: 流程图 / 地图概述句
templates.scene: Process / Map 题型
templates.sentence: Overall, the process / transformation involves ___ key stages, beginning with ___ and ending with ___.
templates.how: 流程图 / 地图概述固定套这一句，考官想看的就是'几步、起点、终点'。
templates.example: Overall, the process involves five key stages, beginning with raw material collection and ending with packaging for delivery.
templates.pitfall: stages 数量必须数对，地图题改成 major changes。

templates.title: 反差对比句
templates.scene: 图表里两个数据差距很大
templates.sentence: The most striking contrast lies between ___ and ___, with the former far exceeding the latter throughout the period.
templates.how: The most striking contrast 是非常高分的开头方式。the former / the latter 体现你掌握指代用法。
templates.example: The most striking contrast lies between urban and rural areas, with the former far exceeding the latter throughout the period.
templates.pitfall: the former 一定指前面提到的那一项，the latter 一定指后面那一项，不要搞反。

templates.title: 数据上升 / 下降句
templates.scene: 描述具体的数字变化
templates.sentence: The figure for ___ rose / fell sharply from ___ to ___, marking a ___ % increase / decrease over the decade.
templates.how: The figure for ___ 是描述具体数字的安全表达。marking a ___% 把变化幅度量化。
templates.example: The figure for online shopping rose sharply from 12% to 48%, marking a 36 percentage point increase over the decade.
templates.pitfall: 百分比和百分点是两回事：20% 涨到 30% 是 50% 增长，但只是 10 个百分点的增长。

templates.title: 拐点 / 峰值句
templates.scene: 图表里有最高点 / 转折点
templates.sentence: The figure peaked at ___ in ___, before gradually leveling off in the following years.
templates.how: peaked at ___ in ___ 是描述峰值的标准句式。leveling off 表示'趋于平稳'，比 not change much 高级。
templates.example: The figure peaked at 320 million in 2018, before gradually leveling off in the following years.
templates.pitfall: leveling off 用于'先涨后稳'，不要用于'先稳后涨'。

templates.title: 稳定 / 波动句
templates.scene: 描述某项数据没什么变化或小幅波动
templates.sentence: By contrast, ___ remained relatively stable, fluctuating slightly within a narrow range of ___ to ___.
templates.how: remained relatively stable 表示'基本稳定但不是完全不变'，fluctuating slightly within a narrow range 把'稳定中的波动'写清楚。
templates.example: By contrast, the consumption of tea remained relatively stable, fluctuating slightly within a narrow range of 50 to 60 kilograms per capita.
templates.pitfall: 如果数据完全没变，用 remained unchanged at ___，不要叠加 fluctuating。

templates.title: 流程 / 地图阶段连接句
templates.scene: Process / Map 题型的中段过渡
templates.sentence: Once ___ has been completed, the next stage involves ___, which prepares the ___ for the subsequent step.
templates.how: Once ___ has been completed 是流程图过渡的安全句式。subsequent step 比 next step 更地道。
templates.example: Once the dough has been kneaded, the next stage involves leaving it to rise, which prepares the mixture for the subsequent baking step.
templates.pitfall: 流程图全文用一般现在时被动态，不要用过去时。

items: 题目问的核心点，每段是否都正面回应了？
我的立场（同意 / 不同意 / 部分同意）有没有写清楚？
题目里的关键词，主体段里有没有展开？
每段开头有没有主题句？
段落之间的过渡，是用逻辑（because, therefore）还是堆词（and, also）？
代词指代清楚吗？this / that / it 指的是哪一个？
有没有重复词没换（people / individuals / citizens）？
有没有口语词没改（lots of, a lot of, get）？
学术词用得对不对（搭配是否成立）？
有没有至少 2 个复合句 + 1 个虚拟语气 / 倒装？
时态有没有混用（小作文要统一）？
主谓一致、单复数有没有错？
